integration_map.change: Populate Init%InData_AD%rotors(iRot)%BladeLoadCorrFactor from p_FAST before the AD_Init call at line 716. p_FAST receives the value from the primary FAST input file parser.
Add 'typedef ^ RotParameterType ReKi BladeLoadCorrFactor - - - "Blade-element load correction factor" -' inside the RotParameterType block; regenerate AeroDyn_Types.f90 afterwards.
After Registry regeneration RotParameterType gains BladeLoadCorrFactor (ReKi). If editing manually, insert the scalar field declaration inside TYPE RotParameterType at approximately line 390.
Inside AD_Init, assign p%rotors(iR)%BladeLoadCorrFactor from parsed input file data for each rotor (near lines 400-500 where other RotParameterType scalars are populated).
Inside RotCalcOutput, after SetOutputsFromBEMT transfers blade loads to y (line 2280), multiply y%BladeLoad(k)%Force and %Moment arrays by p%BladeLoadCorrFactor over all blades k.

Optional deeper injection: extend BEMT_ParameterType with BladeLoadCorrFactor via BEMT_Registry and apply correction inside BEMT_CalcOutput_Inductions (line 1458) at per-blade-element level for finer control.
